---
title: "Untitled"
author: "BRW"
date: "2026-04-29"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(here)
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
})

pal_crops <- c(
  "Corn"     = "#EEC900",
  "Soybeans" = "#548B54",
  "Wheat"    = "#8B7355",
  "Sorghum"  = "darkorange"
)

# ---- load new workflow historical integration outputs ----
crop_basin_perha <- read_csv(
  here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "integration", "int_crop_areanorm_annual.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

basin_totals <- read_csv(
  here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "integration", "int_basin_annual.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# ---- recreate p_overview_crop ----
df_long_crop <- crop_basin_perha %>%
  select(
    Year, Crop,
    Yield_kgHa,
    NetReturn_ha,
    Irrigation_m,
    Crop_prc,
    fert_kgcrop
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Yield_kgHa, NetReturn_ha, Irrigation_m, Crop_prc, fert_kgcrop),
    names_to = "Variable",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = factor(
      Variable,
      levels = c("Yield_kgHa", "NetReturn_ha", "Irrigation_m", "Crop_prc", "fert_kgcrop"),
      labels = c(
        "Yield (kg/ha)",
        "Net Return ($/ha)",
        "Irrigation (m)",
        "Crop %",
        "Fertilizer (kg/yr)"
      )
    )
  )

p_overview_crop <- ggplot(df_long_crop, aes(x = Year, y = Value, color = Crop)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_crops) +
  facet_wrap(~ Variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Integrated model outputs over time: crop area-normalized",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Value"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12)

p_overview_crop
```


```{r}
# ---- recreate p_overview_basin ----
df_long_basin <- basin_totals %>%
  select(
    Year,
    Yield_total_kg,
    NitrateFluxPredicted_kg,
    Irrigation_total_m3,
    Area_m2,
    NetReturn_total_usd
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      Yield_total_kg,
      NitrateFluxPredicted_kg,
      Irrigation_total_m3,
      Area_m2,
      NetReturn_total_usd
    ),
    names_to = "Variable",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = factor(
      Variable,
      levels = c(
        "Yield_total_kg",
        "NitrateFluxPredicted_kg",
        "Irrigation_total_m3",
        "Area_m2",
        "NetReturn_total_usd"
      ),
      labels = c(
        "Pred Yield (kg)",
        "Pred Nitrate Flux (kg)",
        "Pred Irrigation (m³)",
        "Hist. Cult. Area (m²)",
        "Pred Net Return ($)"
      )
    )
  )

p_overview_basin <- ggplot(df_long_basin, aes(x = Year, y = Value, color = Variable)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ Variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Integrated model outputs over time: basin totals",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Value"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_overview_basin
```



```{r}
library(purrr)
library(stringr)

# ---- load deterministic (future) results ----
run_root <- here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "factorial_runs")

res_files <- list.files(
  run_root,
  pattern = "^deterministic_results_.*\\.csv$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

# clean + keep only ensemble runs (optional but recommended)
res_files <- res_files[file.exists(res_files)]
res_files <- res_files[str_detect(res_files, "ensemble")]

results_plot <- map_dfr(res_files, function(f) {
  read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      combo_name = str_remove(basename(f), "^deterministic_results_"),
      combo_name = str_remove(combo_name, "\\.csv$")
    )
}) %>%
  mutate(
    profit_usdyr = -neg_profit_usdyr,
    mgmt = paste(irrigation_name, fertilizer_name, sep = " | ")
  )
```



```{r}
hist_cult_area <- read_csv(
  here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_basin_hist_baseline.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  rename_with(~ stringr::str_replace_all(.x, " ", "_")) %>%
  transmute(
    Year,
    landuse_name = "historical",
    climate_pathway = "historical",
    Cult_m2 = LandCover_m2_all_cult
  )

future_cult_area <- results_plot %>%
  filter(landuse_name %in% c("fixed", "bau")) %>%
  distinct(Year, landuse_name, climate_pathway, Cult_m2)

cult_area_all <- bind_rows(hist_cult_area, future_cult_area)

ggplot(cult_area_all, aes(x = Year, y = Cult_m2 / 1e6, color = landuse_name)) +
   # raw historical (faded)
  geom_line(
    data = cult_area_all %>% filter(landuse_name == "historical"),
    alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.7
  ) +

  # smoothed historical
  geom_smooth(
    data = cult_area_all %>% filter(landuse_name == "historical"),
    method = "loess",
    span = 0.75,   # <-- adjust smoothness
    se = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +

  # future lines (no smoothing)
  geom_line(
    data = cult_area_all %>% filter(landuse_name != "historical"),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = expression("Cultivated area (km"^2*")"),
    title = "Historical and projected cultivated area"
  ) +
geom_vline(xintercept = c(2025, 2050, 2075),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "grey55") +
    annotate("text", x = 2014, y = Inf, label = "Historical",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  annotate("text", x = 2037, y = Inf, label = "Early century",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  annotate("text", x = 2062, y = Inf, label = "Mid century",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  annotate("text", x = 2087, y = Inf, label = "Late century",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      historical = "black",
      fixed = "#1B9E77",
      bau = "#D95F02"
    ),
    labels = c(
      historical = "Historical",
      fixed = "Fixed",
      bau = "BAU"
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(2000, 2025, 2050, 2075, 2100),
    limits = c(min(cult_area_all$Year, na.rm = TRUE), 2100)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = expression("Cultivated area (km"^2*")"),
    color = "Land-use scenario",
    title = "Historical and projected cultivated area"
  ) +
 
  theme_test(base_size = 13) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )




cult_area_all %>%
  group_by(landuse_name) %>%
  summarise(
    min_km2 = min(Cult_m2 / 1e6, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_km2 = max(Cult_m2 / 1e6, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_km2 = mean(Cult_m2 / 1e6, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r}
int_check <- read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs","integration", "int_basin_annual.csv"))

lc_check <- read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs","common_inputs_basin_hist_baseline.csv"))

left_join(int_check, lc_check, by = "Year") %>%
  mutate(diff = Area_m2 - LandCover_m2_all_cult) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_diff = mean(diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_diff = mean(diff / LandCover_m2_all_cult, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```



```{r}
# ---- historical climate ----
clim_hist <- readr::read_csv(
  here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_basin_hist_baseline.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  transmute(
    Year,
    climate_pathway = "historical",
    period = "historical",
    precip_m = Climate_precip_m,
    tmin_C = Climate_Tmin_C,
    tmax_C = Climate_Tmax_C
  )

# ---- future climate ----
clim_future <- bind_rows(
  readr::read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_basin_ensemble_rcp45_early.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp45", period = "early"),
  readr::read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_basin_ensemble_rcp45_mid.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp45", period = "mid"),
  readr::read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_basin_ensemble_rcp45_late.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp45", period = "late"),
  readr::read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_basin_ensemble_rcp85_early.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp85", period = "early"),
  readr::read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_basin_ensemble_rcp85_mid.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp85", period = "mid"),
  readr::read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_basin_ensemble_rcp85_late.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp85", period = "late")
) %>%
  transmute(
    Year,
    climate_pathway,
    period,
    precip_m = Climate_precip_m,
    tmin_C = Climate_Tmin_C,
    tmax_C = Climate_Tmax_C
  )

clim_hist_overlay <- clim_hist %>%
  select(-climate_pathway) %>%
  tidyr::crossing(
    climate_pathway = c("rcp45", "rcp85")
  )

clim_plot <- bind_rows(clim_hist_overlay, clim_future) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(precip_m, tmin_C, tmax_C),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    source = if_else(period == "historical", "historical", climate_pathway),
    variable = recode(
      variable,
      precip_m = "Precipitation (m)",
      tmin_C = "Minimum temperature (°C)",
      tmax_C = "Maximum temperature (°C)"
    )
  )



p_climate_ppt <- clim_plot %>% filter(variable == "Precipitation (m)") %>%
ggplot( aes(Year, value, color = source)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(2023, 2049, 2074), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey70") +
 #facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_test(base_size = 15) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "skyblue", "maroon")) +
      annotate("text", x = 2014, y = Inf, label = "Historical",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  annotate("text", x = 2037, y = Inf, label = "Early century",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  annotate("text", x = 2062, y = Inf, label = "Mid century",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  annotate("text", x = 2087, y = Inf, label = "Late century",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "Historical and projected basin climate inputs",
    subtitle = "Precipitation (m)", 
    x = "Year",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Climate"
  )

p_climate_ppt


p_climate_tmax <- clim_plot %>% filter(variable == "Maximum temperature (°C)") %>%
ggplot( aes(Year, value, color = source)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(2023, 2049, 2074), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey70") +
 #facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_test(base_size = 15) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "skyblue", "maroon")) +
      annotate("text", x = 2014, y = Inf, label = "Historical",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  annotate("text", x = 2037, y = Inf, label = "Early century",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  annotate("text", x = 2062, y = Inf, label = "Mid century",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  annotate("text", x = 2087, y = Inf, label = "Late century",
           vjust = 1.5, size = 4) +
  labs(
    subtitle = "Maximum temperature (°C)",
    x = "Year",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Climate"
  )

p_climate_tmax

p_climate_ppt / p_climate_tmax


clim_future %>%
  summarise(
    tmin_min = min(tmin_C, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmin_max = max(tmin_C, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_min = min(tmax_C, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_max = max(tmax_C, na.rm = TRUE)
  )






# 1) Compare future climate used by irrigation model
clim_check <- bind_rows(
  read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_county_ensemble_rcp45_early.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp45", period = "early"),
  read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_county_ensemble_rcp45_mid.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp45", period = "mid"),
  read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_county_ensemble_rcp45_late.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp45", period = "late"),
  read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_county_ensemble_rcp85_early.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp85", period = "early"),
  read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_county_ensemble_rcp85_mid.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp85", period = "mid"),
  read_csv(here("hpc_opt", "outputs", "common_inputs_county_ensemble_rcp85_late.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% mutate(climate_pathway = "rcp85", period = "late")
) %>%
  filter(Crop %in% c("Corn", "Soybeans")) %>%
  group_by(climate_pathway, Year) %>%
  summarise(
    precip_m = mean(precip_m, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_C_avg = mean(tmax_C_avg, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmin_C_avg = mean(tmin_C_avg, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

clim_check %>%
  group_by(climate_pathway) %>%
  summarise(
    precip_min = min(precip_m, na.rm = TRUE),
    precip_mean = mean(precip_m, na.rm = TRUE),
    precip_max = max(precip_m, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_min = min(tmax_C_avg, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_mean = mean(tmax_C_avg, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_max = max(tmax_C_avg, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


results_plot %>%
  group_by(climate_pathway, Year, landuse_name) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_irrig = mean(irrigation_m3yr, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_irrig = min(irrigation_m3yr, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_irrig = max(irrigation_m3yr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(climate_pathway == "rcp45", mean_irrig < 1e6)


models <- load_models(here("hpc_opt", "models"))
summary(models$irrigation_lm)

```



- irrigation floor
```{r}
wu_alluvial <- readr::read_csv(
  here("data", "WaterUseByCrop_AlluvialCorridor.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# convert to depth
wu_depth <- wu_alluvial %>%
  mutate(
    irrArea_m2 = irrArea_ha * 1e4,
    depth_m = waterUse_m3 / irrArea_m2
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(depth_m), depth_m > 0)

wu_depth %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(depth_m),
    p5 = quantile(depth_m, 0.05),
    p10 = quantile(depth_m, 0.10),
    p25 = quantile(depth_m, 0.25),
    median = median(depth_m),
    mean = mean(depth_m),
    p75 = quantile(depth_m, 0.75),
    max = max(depth_m)
  )

ggplot(wu_depth, aes(depth_m)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Historical irrigation depth (m)")
```






```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
library(tidyr)

# ---- load one MACA model/scenario ----
clim_daily <- read_csv(
  here("data", "ClimateData_County_cnrm_cm5_rcp85_early.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# ---- QC summary ----
clim_daily %>%
  summarise(
    tmin_min = min(tmmn_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmin_mean = mean(tmmn_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmin_max = max(tmmn_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_min = min(tmmx_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_mean = mean(tmmx_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_max = max(tmmx_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_tmin_gt_tmax = sum(tmmn_C_gridmet > tmmx_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    precip_min = min(precip_mm_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    precip_mean = mean(precip_mm_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    precip_max = max(precip_mm_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE)
  )



clim_annual <- clim_daily %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(
    precip_m = sum(mean(precip_mm_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE)) / 1000,
    tmin_C = mean(tmmn_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_C = mean(tmmx_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(precip_m, tmin_C, tmax_C),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  )

ggplot(clim_annual, aes(Year, value)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "QC climate plot: CNRM-CM5 RCP45 early",
    x = "Year",
    y = NULL
  )


hist_daily <- read_csv(
  here("data", "ClimateData_County_hist_baseline.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

hist_annual <- hist_daily %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(
    source = "historical",
    precip_m = sum(mean(precip_mm_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE)) / 1000,
    tmin_C = mean(tmmn_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_C = mean(tmmx_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

future_annual <- clim_daily %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(
    source = "cnrm_cm5_rcp45_early",
    precip_m = sum(mean(precip_mm_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE)) / 1000,
    tmin_C = mean(tmmn_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    tmax_C = mean(tmmx_C_gridmet, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

bind_rows(hist_annual, future_annual) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(precip_m, tmin_C, tmax_C), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(Year, value, color = source)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "Historical vs CNRM-CM5 RCP45 early climate",
    x = "Year",
    y = NULL,
    color = NULL
  )
```
